item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, ini bukan berarti hak individu diabaikan sepenuhnya; hanya saja nilai-nilai kolektivisme lebih dominan dalam budaya kita.

notes: Agent A begins clearly pro-society but visibly softens into a balance frame while still saying Indonesian collectivism is dominant. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, allowing coexistence and interpretation but repeatedly asserting that individual rights are foundational and not easily overridden.
